title: Audit Finding
description: One row in audit-findings.jsonl emitted by phase 2 of the deep-agent-improvement release-cleanup packet. Each line is a separate JSON document conforming to this schema.

artifact_path.description: Repo-relative path to the deep-agent-improvement artifact under audit (e.g. .opencode/skills/deep-agent-improvement/references/loop_protocol.md)

template_ref.description: Repo-relative path to the sk-doc template the artifact is compared against (e.g. .opencode/skills/sk-doc/assets/skill/skill_reference_template.md)

severity.description: P0 = HARD BLOCKER, P1 = required (resolve or get approval), P2 = optional (can defer with rationale)

finding_class.description: Required by checklist CHK-FIX-001. Drives blast-radius assessment.

description.description: Specific deviation description with file:line refs where applicable

evidence.description: Optional list of evidence pointers (file:line, command output snippet, grep result)

status.description: Status at the moment this line was last updated

resolution_sha.description: Git SHA of the commit that resolved this finding (required when status=resolved)

deferral_rationale.description: Required when status=deferred. Explains why the fix is being held.

detected_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the finding was emitted

resolved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when status transitioned to resolved or deferred

examples.description: README §5 STRUCTURE lists 10 references and §6 SCRIPTS lists 8 scripts, but the skill ships 15 references and 14 scripts. Undocumented references: candidate_proposal_format, mixed_executor_methodology, profiling_audit_log, promotion_gate_contract, score_dimensions. Undocumented scripts: benchmark-stability, candidate-lineage, improvement-journal, materialize-benchmark-fixtures, mutation-coverage, trade-off-detector.
examples.recommended_fix: Phase-3 README rewrite: regenerate §5 STRUCTURE + §6 SCRIPTS from the live directory so all 15 references and 14 scripts appear.
